| | | |
|---|---|---|
| 🧠 | [**Learn**](https://uw-madison-datascience.github.io/ML-X-Nexus/Learn/) | Build your skills with workshops, books, videos, guides, and notebooks |
| 🛠 | [**Toolbox**](https://uw-madison-datascience.github.io/ML-X-Nexus/Toolbox/) | Find models, datasets, libraries, and compute resources for your next project |
| 🖊️ | [**Stories**](https://uw-madison-datascience.github.io/ML-X-Nexus/Applications/) | Explore blogs, talks, and real-world applications of ML/AI |
| 🚀 | [**Projects**](https://uw-madison-datascience.github.io/ML-X-Nexus/Projects/) | Tackle ML/AI challenges from labs, hackathons, and partners |

**Disclaimer**: *The crowdsourced resources on this website are not endorsed by the UW-Madison and have not been vetted by the Division of Information Technology.*
